title: Almond Star Steamie
description: A kid-friendly Moroccan dish featuring almond essence, steam, and sugar-free-friendly, with a smoky and juicy flavor profile.
instructions: Mix almond essence, all-purpose flour, and granulated sugar in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add unsalted butter, stirring until the mixture reaches a crumbly texture.
Incorporate baking powder and cinnamon into the dough. Mix well.
Fold in saffron strands carefully to give it a distinctive Moroccan flavor.
Transfer the dough onto a greased baking sheet and pat it evenly with your hands or use a rolling pin to create an approximately 1/4-inch thick layer.
Bake for about 20-30 minutes until golden brown.
